---
format: html
date: last-modified
author: "Huanfa Chen"
title: "Week 8"
---

## Introduction

This week will introduce how to select features for training machine learning models.

## Learning Objectives

By the end of this week, you will be able to:

1. Understand feature selection in linear models.
2. Understand various feature selection methods for machine learning models.

## Lecture 

To access the lecture notes: [Lecture](W08_feature_selection/feature_selection.qmd)

## Quiz

To access the quiz on Moodle, please check [Moodle page](https://moodle.ucl.ac.uk/course/view.php?id=53572).

## Practical

:::{.callout-note}

To save a copy of notebook to your own GitHub Repo: follow the GitHub link, click on `Raw` and then `Save File As...` to save it to your own computer. Make sure to change the extension from `.ipynb.txt` (which will probably be the default) to `.ipynb`before adding the file to *your* GitHub repository.

:::

To access the practical:

1. [Preview](W08_feature_selection/feature_selection_practical.html)
2. [Download](W08_feature_selection/feature_selection_practical.ipynb)

## Further resources
